name: Taiwan Calsonic Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Calsonic Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells car air conditioning products, electronics, and other products in Taiwan. The company offers car air conditioning systems, such as unified central panels, air conditioning controllers, driver alert systems, night vision systems, body control modules, condensers, evaporators, blowers, motors, inter coolers, water cooled radiators, and chip coolers; and engineering products, including vacuum, air, and no fuse breakers, as well as electromagnetic contractors, inverters, programmable controllers, energy saving systems, robots, control devices, and thin film extension products. It also provides power distribution equipment and industry automatic control products, as well as industrial robot/electronic process equipment. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
